gazette: Directorate General of Trade Research and Risk Assessment
title: Expansion of Mandatory Labeling for Products in Russia
bodyHtml:
The "Unified Product Labeling and Tracking System" is used for products imported into the Russian Federation, aiming to trace the process from entry into the country to reaching the final consumer through "QR" codes.

New product groups are regularly added to the mandatory labeling system, with 14 product groups currently included, ongoing pilot projects in 12 product groups, and one product group having completed the pilot project and ready to be integrated into the system.

Currently, mandatory labeling is applied to the following product categories: fur coats, shoes, tobacco, pharmaceuticals, textiles and ready-to-wear garments, dairy products, perfumery products, cameras , tires, bottled water, beer and low-alcohol beverages, non-alcoholic beverages, medical devices, wheelchairs, disinfectants in contact with skin, and biologically active food substances.

Mandatory labeling for bicycles will commence on September 1, 2024. Pilot implementation processes are underway for anchovy and salmon caviar, titanium metal products, rehabilitation technical equipment, radio-electronic products, fiber optic products, drugs used in veterinary medicine, children's toys, vegetable oils, pet foods, pharmaceutical raw materials, drugs, perfumery, cosmetics, household chemicals, and certain types of canned foods.

It is known that efforts are being made to initiate the mandatory labeling application for a broader range of product groups in the coming periods. The scope of mandatory labeling for products including textile and ready-to-wear garments, has been expanded as of April 1, 2024.

For detailed information on the mandatory labeling application and the list of products based on the GTIP, you can visit the Counselor Reports page at https://ticaret.gov.tr/data/5bcc5d4813b876034cfece26/Zorunlu%20Etiketleme%20Bilgi%20Notu.pdf

The relevant information note is regularly updated on this page.
